description: Fix Harvest popup flow (add initial confirmation popup with coin icon), fix player name colors in PoliticsTrack, and improve Betray mandate styling
steps: 1. In src/components/HarvestPopup.tsx: Add a first-stage popup before showing province rewards. When harvestPopupVisible first becomes true (harvestResolutionIndex === 0), show a confirmation popup that says 'Todos los jugadores han recibido' (or translated equivalent) with the same visual format as the harvest rewards popup, showing a coin icon below the text. Only after the user confirms this initial popup should the province-by-province reward popups appear.

2. Add a new state field to track whether the initial harvest confirmation has been shown. Options: (a) add a boolean `harvestInitialConfirmed` to the GameState in src/types/game.ts, or (b) use a local React state in HarvestPopup.tsx that resets when harvestMandateActive becomes true. Option (b) is simpler - use local state in the component.
3. Add i18n keys: 'harvest.allPlayersReceived' = 'Todos los jugadores han recibido' (es) / 'All players have received' (en). Add to both src/i18n/en.ts and src/i18n/es.ts.

4. In src/components/PoliticsTrack.tsx: The slot-player-name span already has `style={{ color: clanColor }}` set correctly via the `clanColor` variable derived from CLANS.find. Verify this works. The issue might be that `mandate.issuer` stores a playerId but it's being used to look up a clan. Check: the code does `const clan = CLANS.find((c) => c.id === mandate.issuer)` which is WRONG - mandate.issuer is a PLAYER ID, not a clan ID. Fix: look up the player first, then get their clan. Change to: find player by mandate.issuer in gameState.players, then find clan by player.clanId.

5. In src/components/ActionPanel.tsx: Improve the betray-active section styling. The player name should always display in their clan color. Add more visual structure: show the player name prominently with clan color, add a brief descriptive icon or visual element, ensure the 'betrayClickInstruction' text is clearly separated and styled as italic guidance. Add appropriate CSS classes.
6. Add CSS in src/App.css for the improved betray section: better padding, a subtle gradient background, the player name in larger font with clan color, and better spacing between elements.
acceptance_criteria: Build passes with npm run build
When Harvest mandate fires, first popup shows 'Todos los jugadores han recibido' with a coin icon, requiring user confirmation before province rewards appear
Player names in the PoliticsTrack mandate slots display with their correct clan color
Betray mandate section shows player name in clan color with improved layout
